title: An Act authorizing the town of South Hadley to grant additional licenses for the sale of all alcoholic beverages

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Gómez of Easthampton, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 4964) of Homar Gómez (by vote of the town) that the town of South Hadley be authorized to grant additional licenses for the sale of all alcoholic beverages in said town.  Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure

related_entities.name: committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 03/27/2026 from 09:00 AM-05:00 PM in Written Testimony Only
Accompanied a new draft, see H5343
